title: Loopress global configuration
description: Global CLI state stored at $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/loopress/config.json (or ~/.config/loopress/config.json): known projects, their environments, and which one is currently active.

currentProject.description: Pointer to the currently active project and environment, or null if none is selected.

projects.description: Known projects, keyed by project id.

telemetry.description: User preferences for error reporting, set via `lps telemetry disable`/`lps telemetry enable`.

env.description: Name of the currently active environment.

id.description: Id of the currently active project.

addedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the project was added.

apiProjectId.description: Id of the matching project on the Loopress API, once pushed via `lps project push`.

environments.description: Environments for this project, keyed by environment name.

disabled.description: Whether error reporting to Sentry is disabled.

addedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the environment was added.

apiEnvironmentId.description: Id of the matching environment on the Loopress API, once pushed via `lps project push`.

token.description: API token used to authenticate against this environment.

url.description: Base URL of the WordPress site for this environment.
